phrases.intent_en: Ask where to rent a sun lounger
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo alquilar una tumbona?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DON-deh PWEH-doh ahl-keel-AR oo-nah toom-BOH-nah?

likely_response.local: En el puesto azul, cerca de la entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL poo-EH-stoh ah-THOOL THEHR-kah DEH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the blue stall, near the entrance.

responses.english: At the blue stall, near the entrance.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL poo-EH-stoh ah-THOOL THEHR-kah DEH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
responses.french: En el puesto azul, cerca de la entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the beachside café is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la cafetería de la playa?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah kah-feh-teh-REE-ah deh lah PLAH-yah?

likely_response.local: Al final de la playa, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL fee-NAHL DEH LAH PLAH-yah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the beach, on the right.

responses.english: At the end of the beach, on the right.
responses.phonetic: AHL fee-NAHL DEH LAH PLAH-yah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Al final de la playa, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the shower facilities are
phrases.text_local: Perdón, ¿dónde encuentro las duchas para visitantes?
phrases.pronunciation: pehr-DOHN, DOHN-day en-koo-EN-troh lahs DOO-chahs PAH-rah vee-see-TAHN-tehs?

likely_response.local: Cerca de los vestuarios, al lado izquierdo.
likely_response.pronunciation: THEHR-kah DEH LOHS beh-stoo-ah-REE-ohs AHL LAH-doh eeth-k-ee-EHR-doh
likely_response.translation_en: Near the changing rooms, on the left side.

responses.english: Near the changing rooms, on the left side.
responses.phonetic: THEHR-kah DEH LOHS beh-stoo-ah-REE-ohs AHL LAH-doh eeth-k-ee-EHR-doh
responses.french: Cerca de los vestuarios, al lado izquierdo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest bus stop is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde está la parada de guagua más cercana?
phrases.pronunciation: dee-SKOOL-peh DÓN-deh EHSTÁ LAH pah-RAH-dah DEH g-ah-G-ah MÁS thehr-KAH-nah

likely_response.local: Junto al chiringuito 'El Varadero', salida playa.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AHL chee-reen-g-EE-toh EHL bah-rah-DEH-roh sah-LEE-dah PLAH-yah
likely_response.translation_en: On the main road, crossing the street.

responses.english: On the main road, crossing the street.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AHL chee-reen-g-EE-toh EHL bah-rah-DEH-roh sah-LEE-dah PLAH-yah
responses.french: Junto al chiringuito 'El Varadero', salida playa.
